title: ageratina manantlana
intro: Ageratina manantlana is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Ageratina manantlana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and joint pain, and even help in the management of diabetes. Ageratina manantlana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
